# UC-22.52.28 · SOCI cross-cutting health dashboard — single executive view of CIRMP + Asset Register + ECSO + GAP + Protected Info compliance posture

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Governance &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We bring together all 27 SOCI controls into one big scoreboard the CEO can see in 30 seconds: green if everything is healthy, yellow if a check is stale, red if a check has stopped producing evidence. This is the one slide we always need for the board pack.*

---

## Description

Cross-cutting executive dashboard combining the 27 contributing SOCI UCs into 12 high-level KPIs covering Asset Register, CIRMP lifecycle, incident reporting, SoNS obligations, cyber-hazard, personnel-hazard, supply-chain-hazard, physical-natural-hazard, annual report, Protected Information, ECSO notice, and Government Directions.

## Value

Boards and regulators expect a single defensible view of SOCI compliance posture. Building this once and feeding the underlying UCs into it gives the CEO and CISO a recurring artefact that closes out audits and board presentations efficiently.

## Implementation

(1) Ensure all contributing UCs are operational. (2) Schedule UC-22.52.28 daily; produce 12 KPI rows; render the dashboard at executive-level. (3) Archive every row to `audit_evidence` for cross-quarter audit trail.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.52.28` archived daily to `audit_evidence` with `soci_clause="SOCI-cross-cutting-health"`. Every row pins (kpi_id, kpi_label, kpi_value, kpi_target, kpi_status, contributing_ucs, evidence_link). Dashboard `SOCI — Cross-Cutting Compliance Health` is the single executive view.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Disable one of the contributing UCs (e.g. UC-22.52.18 supply-chain). UC-22.52.28 MUST flag the affected KPI (`SOCI-r8-coverage`) as `kpi_status="degraded"` because the underlying data is missing.

### Negative scenario

All contributing UCs operating; UC-22.52.28 MUST record `kpi_status="green"` for all 12 KPIs.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- Splunk Enterprise ≥9.2 or Splunk Cloud.
- UCs 22.52.1 through 22.52.27 deployed.
- ES, ServiceNow add-on.
- `index=audit_evidence` (7-year retention).
- Lookup `sparse_uc_lookup` (uc_id, expected_evidence_cadence_days, rationale).

## Step 1 — Configure data collection

No new data feeds; reuses `audit_evidence` from contributing UCs.

## Step 2 — Create the search and alert

Schedule daily:

```ini
[UC-22.52.28: SOCI cross-cutting compliance health]
cron_schedule = 0 13 * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -1d@d
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.52.28,reg=SOCI,clause=SOCI-cross-cutting-health
action.notable.param.rule_title = SOCI cross-cutting KPI degraded
action.notable.param.security_domain = audit
action.notable.param.severity = high
alert.severity = 4
```

Notable severity: `degraded` and `stale` → high.

## Step 3 — Validate deployment

**(a)** Positive control: temporarily disable a contributing UC; KPI shifts to `degraded`.

**(b)** Negative control: all UCs running; all KPIs `green`.

## Step 4 — Operationalize

**Dashboard**: `SOCI — Cross-Cutting Compliance Health`.

- 12 KPI scorecard.
- 12-month trend per KPI.
- Drill-through to contributing UCs.
- Outstanding-actions backlog roll-up.
- Quarterly PDF export for the board pack.

**Runbook for `degraded` / `stale`** (owner: CISO + Head of Critical-Infrastructure Compliance, severity P2):

1. Within 1 business day: identify the failing contributing UC.
2. Within 5 business days: restore evidence flow.
3. Document the gap in the Rule 10 report's continuous-improvement section.

## Step 5 — Troubleshooting

**Unmapped UCs**: extend the SPL `case` statement when new SOCI UCs are added.

**Sparse-evidence UCs**: ensure exemptions are documented to avoid false `stale` flags.

**SOCI-specific failure modes**:

- **Cross-jurisdictional reporting**: if the entity is also subject to EU NIS2, US CIRCIA, or other frameworks, ensure the dashboard supports a multi-regulator view with separate filters.
- **Board-pack export**: ensure the PDF carries classification handling per the Information Security Manager's policy.
- **Roll-up over multiple entities**: large groups with multiple responsible-entity registrations may need a sub-dashboard per entity.
- **Audit conformance**: when the dashboard is shared with the CISC during an audit, retain a quarterly snapshot in `audit_evidence` for immutability.

## SPL

```spl
index=audit_evidence reg=SOCI earliest=-24h@h
| eval kpi_bucket = case(
    uc IN ("22.52.1"), "asset_register",
    uc IN ("22.52.2","22.52.3","22.52.4"), "cirmp_lifecycle",
    uc IN ("22.52.5","22.52.6"), "incident_reporting",
    uc IN ("22.52.7","22.52.8","22.52.9","22.52.10","22.52.11"), "sons_obligations",
    uc IN ("22.52.12","22.52.13","22.52.14","22.52.15"), "cirmp_cyber_hazard",
    uc IN ("22.52.16","22.52.17"), "personnel_hazard",
    uc IN ("22.52.18","22.52.19"), "supply_chain_hazard",
    uc IN ("22.52.20","22.52.21"), "physical_natural_hazard",
    uc IN ("22.52.22","22.52.23"), "annual_report",
    uc IN ("22.52.24","22.52.25"), "protected_information",
    uc IN ("22.52.26"), "ecso_notice",
    uc IN ("22.52.27"), "government_directions",
    1=1, "other")
| stats count AS evidence_rows latest(_time) AS last_evidence_at by kpi_bucket uc
| stats sum(evidence_rows) AS evidence_rows_total dc(uc) AS uc_count list(uc) AS contributing_ucs latest(last_evidence_at) AS last_evidence_at by kpi_bucket
| eval expected_uc_count = case(
    kpi_bucket="asset_register", 1,
    kpi_bucket="cirmp_lifecycle", 3,
    kpi_bucket="incident_reporting", 2,
    kpi_bucket="sons_obligations", 5,
    kpi_bucket="cirmp_cyber_hazard", 4,
    kpi_bucket="personnel_hazard", 2,
    kpi_bucket="supply_chain_hazard", 2,
    kpi_bucket="physical_natural_hazard", 2,
    kpi_bucket="annual_report", 2,
    kpi_bucket="protected_information", 2,
    kpi_bucket="ecso_notice", 1,
    kpi_bucket="government_directions", 1,
    1=1, 0)
| eval kpi_status = case(
    uc_count < expected_uc_count, "degraded",
    (now() - last_evidence_at) > 86400, "stale",
    1=1, "green")
| eval kpi_id = "SOCI-".kpi_bucket
| eval kpi_label = kpi_bucket
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) 12 KPI scorecard. (Panel 2) Posture trend per KPI over 12 months. (Panel 3) Drill-through to contributing UCs. (Panel 4) Outstanding-actions backlog roll-up.

## Known False Positives

1. **UC commissioning** — newly deployed UCs may not have produced enough evidence in 24 hours. Mitigation: tolerate `kpi_status=stale` for the first 7 days after commissioning.

2. **Decommissioned UC** — a renamed or merged UC may produce zero events. Mitigation: update the `kpi_bucket` mapping when UCs are renamed.

3. **Sparse-evidence UCs** — e.g. UC-22.52.27 Government Assistance Powers may legitimately have no rows for months. Mitigation: exclude `sparse_uc_lookup` UCs from staleness checks.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `soci_22_52_28_exceptions`; max grant 7 days with CISO sign-off.

## References

- [SOCI Act 2018 (Cth) — Full statute](https://www.legislation.gov.au/C2018A00029/latest/text)
- [CIRMP Rules 2023](https://www.legislation.gov.au/F2023L00112/latest/text)
